name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in two at the joints.
2. Heat oil to 360°F (170°C) in a large frying pan or skillet.
3. Add the chicken wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
- To bake: Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Spread wings on a baking sheet in one layer and bake for 45 minutes.
4. Combine Tabasco sauce with melted butter in a bowl until well blended.
5. Once cooked, pour the sauce over the chicken wings immediately and serve.
Serves 2-6.
